title: Roper Technologies announces dividend
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Sept. 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) announced that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.6825 per share payable on October 23, 2023 to stockholders of record on October 9, 2023.

title: Roper Technologies (ROP) Is Up 0.96% in One Week: What You Should Know

title: Roper (ROP) Up 16% in 6 Months: Will the Uptrend Continue?
text: Roper (ROP) stands to benefit from strength in its Application Software segment, acquired assets and improving supply chains.

title: 4 IT Services Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Industry
text: The Zacks Computers - IT Services Industry participants like Roper Technologies (ROP), Check Point Software (CHKP), Vertiv (VRT) and Wix.com (WIX) are benefiting from ongoing digitization, strong demand for hybrid working solutions and improving IT spending.
